title: Core Models Path
description: Build fluency in Core Models inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Neural Turing Machines
steps.summary: A type of neural network that uses a memory component to store and retrieve information. It sits inside Neural Networks / Core Models. Start after Neural Network and Neural Networks. It opens into Neural Turing Machines (NTM) and Neural Turing Machines (NTMs).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs)
steps.summary: ** Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Neural Networks / Core Models. Start after Artificial Neural Network and Artificial neural networks.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
